title: Citizen and City Science as Next Steps of Open Science - Brno
author: Marek, Jiří
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Jiří Marek (Masaryk University) presented "Citizen and City Science as Next Steps of Open Science - Brno" at the EUA and OpenAIRE workshop "University approaches to Citizen Science in the transition to Open Science - Institutional opportunities and challenges for creating an open and inclusive environment for Research". 

 For more information, see: https://www.openaire.eu/university-approaches-to-citizen-science
steps_raw:
Jiří Marek (Masaryk University) presented "Citizen and City Science as Next Steps of Open Science - Brno" at the EUA and OpenAIRE workshop "University approaches to Citizen Science in the transition to Open Science - Institutional opportunities and challenges for creating an open and inclusive environment for Research". 

 For more information, see: https://www.openaire.eu/university-approaches-to-citizen-science
